\tzpentry{ID4613}{Greens Function Definition}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4613 introduces Greens Function Definition as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \mathcal{G}_H := \bigoplus_{n=1}^{8} SU(n)_{\text{cube}} \]
